blocks.en: Radio is a broadcast medium: when one device transmits, everyone in range hears it. If two transmit at once on the same channel, the signals collide and both are usually lost.
blocks.zh: 无线电是一种广播介质：一台设备发送时，范围内所有设备都能听到。若两台设备在同一信道上同时发送，信号就会碰撞，通常两者都丢失。

blocks.en: There are two big ideas for sharing: take turns in time, or split the channel into pieces so several devices fit at once. Modern Wi-Fi does both.
blocks.zh: 共享有两个核心思想：在时间上轮流，或把信道切成小块让多台设备同时容纳。现代 Wi-Fi 两者并用。

blocks.en: Splitting the channel is called OFDMA. The channel's subcarriers are grouped into Resource Units (RUs), and different users are assigned different RUs — so they transmit at the same time without colliding.
blocks.zh: 把信道切块称为 OFDMA。信道的子载波被分组成资源单元（RU），不同用户被分配不同的 RU——于是他们同时发送而不碰撞。

blocks.en: Taking turns (the next lesson) and splitting the channel are complementary: turns decide who goes when, OFDMA lets several go together within one turn.
blocks.zh: 轮流（下一节）与切分信道是互补的：轮流决定谁在何时发送，OFDMA 则让若干设备在一次发送机会内同时进行。

q.en: What does OFDMA let multiple users do?
q.zh: OFDMA 让多个用户能够做什么？

options.en: Transmit at the same time on different Resource Units
options.zh: 在不同资源单元上同时发送
